title: Auto trading
author: Playful-Assistant-92
selftext:
I build NinjaTrader automated strategies (Strategy Builder & NinjaScript)

If you have a trading idea and want to automate it, I can help you turn it into a fully working system.

I can handle:

\- Entries & exits logic

\- Stop loss / take profit / trailing

\- Backtesting & optimization

If you're working on something, feel free to share it here or DM me.
